summary: Cyberpunk/sci-fi style glitch text effect component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-glitch-text/src/TitleGlitchText.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleGlitchText` and `titleGlitchTextDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleGlitchText` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Glitch Text Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-glitch-text to my project. Preserve the exported TitleGlitchTextProps API and register the TitleGlitchText composition with the default props.
